nodes.name: Cinnyris
nodes.summary: Cinnyris（Cinnyris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如綠腹花蜜鳥、Western miombo sunbird、Eastern miombo sunbird等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: Congo sunbird
nodes.summary: The Congo sunbird (Cinnyris congensis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Republic of the Congo and Democratic Republic of the Congo. Taxonomy Monotypic. Formerly considered part of the genus Nectarinia, along with other members of the genus Cinnyris. Distribution and habitat Known from the Republic of Congo and the Democratic Republic of the Congo, where it occurs in riverine forests along the banks of the middle Congo River and its tributaries. References
